headline: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
summary: Memorial Day sales are currently in full swing. Find great deals on portable speakers and solar lights. Many favorite tech models are deeply discounted.

headline: Pope Leo calls for being ‘profoundly human’ in the age of AI
summary: Pope Leo XIV released his first major papal document, "Magnifica Humanitas." The manifesto warns of AI risks like warfare and labor impact. It calls for safeguarding human dignity amidst artificial intelligence.

headline: On Trails is a wandering tale that blends hiking, science, and history
summary: The book "On Trails" explores the deep joys of hiking and nature. It masterfully blends elements of science, history, and personal narrative. The reviewer finds solace in the book given personal limitations for hiking.

headline: Apple’s latest MacBook Air is $200 off in both sizes for Memorial Day
summary: Apple's latest MacBook Air is currently available with a $200 discount. This Memorial Day deal applies to both the 13-inch and 15-inch models. The M5 chip model offers strong performance for years to come.

headline: Robin Williams, Robert Duvall, Tom Selleck, and Brendan Fraser Have All Inexplicably Played the Same Role: Dwight D. Eisenhower
summary: Four vastly different actors have all portrayed Dwight D. Eisenhower. Robin Williams, Robert Duvall, Tom Selleck, and Brendan Fraser share no obvious common traits. Eisenhower was a WWII general and the 34th US President.

headline: Rick and Morty Season 9 Premiere Review: "There's Something About Morty"
summary: Rick and Morty Season 9 kicks off with a fun, action-heavy premiere. The episode, "There's Something About Morty," is described as bombastic. However, the review notes one character was badly mishandled.

headline: Nicolas Cage Says Christopher Nolan Won't 'Call Me Back' After Turning Down Insomnia Role
summary: Nicolas Cage claims Christopher Nolan stopped calling him back after a past rejection. Cage turned down a role in Nolan's film "Insomnia." He considers Nolan among directors who no longer contact him.

headline: Sebastian Stan Reveals He Plays "Many Roles" in The Batman: Part II
summary: Sebastian Stan hinted at playing "many roles" in "The Batman: Part II." This suggests his character, Harvey Dent, will transform into Two-Face. Stan made the oblique comments at the Cannes Film Festival.

headline: The questions raised by the Murrell embezzlement controversy
summary: The Murrell embezzlement case has plagued the SNP for five years. A police investigation into the controversy is ongoing. The scandal continues to raise significant questions for the party.

headline: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
summary: Iran states that a deal with the United States is not imminent. This directly contradicts earlier claims from the US Secretary of State. The US official had suggested an agreement could materialize Monday.

headline: White House gunman had previous run-ins with Secret Service, court documents show
summary: A White House suspect previously had encounters with the Secret Service. Court documents reveal he obstructed an entry lane in June 2025. The suspect had also claimed to be Jesus Christ to agents.

headline: Police fire shots in air to disperse angry crowds at DR Congo Ebola treatment centre
summary: Police fired shots into the air to disperse angry crowds in DR Congo. Unrest erupted at an Ebola treatment center over suspected bodies. Crowds were attempting to reclaim the bodies from authorities.
